Localization.Description: DNS zone transfer from an untrusted host

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The transfer of zone {object.name} by TCP AXFR request from untrusted host {src.host} to host {event_src.host} was prohibited
The transfer of zone {object.name} by TCP AXFR request from untrusted host {src.host} to host {event_src.host} was started
